backlog.title: Build FastAPI backend server
backlog.description: Create FastAPI server at platform/src/api/server.py with routes: GET /clients, POST /clients, GET /pipeline, POST /pipeline/add, GET /transfer-bonuses. All return JSON. Enable CORS. Run on port 8000.

backlog.title: Build main business dashboard
backlog.description: Build platform/public/index.html. Include: header with company name and live clock, stats row showing total clients and active searches, booking pipeline table, award alerts feed. Dark theme: background #080c10, accent #00ff88, text #e8edf5. Fetch from localhost:8000 with mock data fallback.

backlog.title: Build transfer bonus monitor
backlog.description: Build platform/src/automation/transfer_monitor.js that checks credit card transfer bonuses and saves results to tasks/transfer_bonuses.json. Check Amex, Chase, Capital One, Citi using axios and cheerio. Write new bonuses to tasks/alerts.json.
